description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline using the python:3.6 Docker image. Define two stages: test and publish. Add a before_script that creates a virtual environment with python3 -m venv workflow, upgrades pip, activates the venv, upgrades wheel and setuptools, and installs the test requirements from requirements_test.txt. In the test stage add a job named test-django-sqlite that runs make coverage. No caches, artifacts, or special rules are defined, and the publish stage is empty.
